title: PGN import progress, cancellation, and partial-success implementation

verified_baseline.worktree_and_index: clean before implementation; no untracked files

defects_reproduced.MISSING-UI-001: The existing file-input path used Promise.all(file.text()), concatenated every file, and parsed the merged text once, so one invalid file invalidated the entire selection and no per-file result existed.
defects_reproduced.MISSING-UI-002: No import-session phase, real filename/index progress, browser-native abort path, cancellation summary, or route/teardown cleanup existed.
defects_reproduced.MISSING-UI-003: Mixed success had no ordered result summary or explicit partial-success confirmation, while all-failed and retry behavior collapsed into Store error text.
defects_reproduced.COR-017: The unified workspace lacked the approved transient multi-file import progress, cancellation, and partial-failure closure.

before_and_after_pipeline.before: file input -> Promise.all file.text -> concatenate all text -> one validation -> one openText or insertText mutation
before_and_after_pipeline.after: typed intent -> one transient import session -> ordered FileReader read/progress -> canonical parse per file -> memory staging -> optional explicit partial confirmation -> one guarded atomic open or insert application

implementation.surface: WS-003 and REQ-002 unified workspace local PGN open/insert flow
implementation.scope: MISSING-UI-001, MISSING-UI-002, MISSING-UI-003, and the contract-independent COR-017 slice only
implementation.controller_owner: the mounted unified workspace PGN runtime
existing_contracts_reused: canonical PGN parser and typed game tree
PGN Store source identity and revision owner

import_session_state_model.single_active_session: a repeated open, insert, or drop focuses the current result heading/action instead of creating a second session
import_session_state_model.lifetime: memory-only for the current mounted workspace runtime; dismissed, cancelled, route-left, or unmounted sessions release staged games, reader ownership, and target ownership

per_file_result_schema.stable_identity: session UUID plus zero-based selection index; duplicate filenames remain distinct

failure_reasons.unsupported-content: 文件内容不是受支持的 PGN

per_file_result_schema.privacy: no absolute path, parser exception, stack, Store name, source ID, hash, worker, endpoint, or browser-internal text is rendered

progress_contract.source: completed file count plus the current FileReader loaded/total byte fraction when length is computable
progress_contract.progressbar: native determinate progress with aria-valuemin=0, aria-valuemax=total files, and aria-valuenow matching the real computed value
progress_contract.live_status: polite current phase and current safe filename/index
progress_contract.security_copy: the accessible description states the total/completed count, local-only parsing, and that files are not uploaded

cancellation_contract.reading: FileReader.abort() rejects the active read as cancelled-read and prevents later files from starting
cancellation_contract.parsing: synchronous canonical parsing is not interruptible mid-call; copy truthfully states that cancellation takes effect after the current parse and before the next file
cancellation_contract.between_files: a MessageChannel task boundary yields after each parse so Escape or Stop can discard staging before the next unit
cancellation_contract.before_application: cancellation discards all staged canonical games and preserves the exact pre-import Store snapshot
cancellation_contract.route_and_teardown: active readers are aborted, the run token is invalidated, staged items and target references are cleared, and stale callbacks cannot apply
cancellation_contract.dirty_confirmation_race: an isCurrent closure is evaluated inside the destructive coordinator immediately before source replacement, preventing a route-cancelled import from mutating after a nested confirmation resolves

atomic_application_contract.staging: successful parsed games remain outside the active Store until the complete batch is accepted
atomic_application_contract.open: one openParsedCollection action establishes the complete accepted batch as one fresh clean local source session
atomic_application_contract.insert: one insertParsedCollection action validates source session, source ID, revision, mutability, and nonempty canonical items before assigning one complete next-items/next-game-ID pair
atomic_application_contract.revision: successful insertion changes sourceRevision from the captured value to captured value plus one exactly once
atomic_application_contract.failure: rejected or throwing application reaches a recoverable failed summary, clears staging, and leaves the original source untouched
atomic_application_contract.stale_guard: the run/session/cancellation/permission identity is checked before apply, inside dirty source replacement immediately before mutation, and synchronously before insert mutation

open_and_insert_behavior.no_source: open is enabled and insert is disabled
open_and_insert_behavior.open: valid files replace only after parsing and any required destructive confirmation; the resulting source receives a new local ID and starts at revision 0/clean revision 0
open_and_insert_behavior.insert: valid files append to the same local source and source session in selection/file/game order; selection, notes, drafts, and existing games remain intact
open_and_insert_behavior.picker_reset: the native input value is cleared before and after each selection, including cancel/retry, so the same file can be selected again

partial_success_behavior.mixed: every selected file remains listed in original order; Store state is unchanged until the explicit 导入成功文件 action
partial_success_behavior.confirmed: only successful files are applied in file/game order; failed files create no placeholder games and the complete result summary remains visible until close
partial_success_behavior.cancelled: closing or cancelling before confirmation discards the staged successful files and preserves the pre-import snapshot
partial_success_behavior.all_success: application proceeds once and reports imported file and game counts
partial_success_behavior.all_failed: nothing is applied; the ordered correction summary offers 重新选择 and 取消 without success copy

dirty_and_source_identity_integration.clean_replacement: a repeated valid local selection created a different local source ID and clean source session
dirty_and_source_identity_integration.dirty_replacement_cancel: 继续编辑 preserved source ID, source session, revision, dirty flag, ordered games, game IDs, and selection
dirty_and_source_identity_integration.dirty_replacement_accept: 放弃更改并继续 applied the accepted batch once as a fresh local source at revision 0/clean revision 0
dirty_and_source_identity_integration.insert: duplicate-filename two-file insertion retained the same source ID/session and changed revision 0 to 1 once
dirty_and_source_identity_integration.mixed_insert: one confirmed successful file changed revision 1 to 2 once while retaining all prior games and IDs
dirty_and_source_identity_integration.stale_route: a route attempt cancelled the import while its destructive confirmation was active; accepting the old confirmation afterward performed no source mutation

accessibility_and_focus.dialog: ProductDialog supplies modal semantics, accessible title/description, focus trap, Escape routing, mask policy, and exact trigger restoration
accessibility_and_focus.initial_focus: active progress focuses the sole safe Stop action
accessibility_and_focus.outcome_focus: partial, completed, cancelled, and failed phases focus the result heading; repeated actions refocus the same outcome
accessibility_and_focus.result_scroll: the bounded result list is the internal long-result scroll region, has tabindex=0, an accessible label, and a token-governed focus-visible ring
accessibility_and_focus.terminal_actions: partial exposes 取消 and 导入成功文件; failure exposes 取消 and 重新选择; terminal close restores the captured invoking control
accessibility_and_focus.browser_keyboard: Tab and Shift+Tab remained trapped, Escape cancelled or closed according to phase, and focus returned to the exact Open or Insert trigger

readonly_and_contract_blocked_behavior.readonly: a real completed-replay-shaped readonly source projected all Open actions enabled and all Insert actions disabled; a blocked Insert click created no session or mutation
readonly_and_contract_blocked_behavior.readonly_open_copy: opening a local file from the readonly source established a separate fresh clean local source without mutating the readonly source
readonly_and_contract_blocked_behavior.contract_blocked: /match/browser-validation rendered the truthful unavailable replay surface with no Open/Insert mutation actions, no Vite overlay, and the preexisting PGN Store snapshot unchanged
readonly_and_contract_blocked_behavior.permission_owner: DEV-SLICE-004 permission projection remains the only broad availability owner; import code independently rechecks Store mutability and captured identity

memory_and_transport_boundary.browser_network_validation: no non-static request occurred during import validation
memory_and_transport_boundary.browser_storage_validation: no import-specific localStorage or sessionStorage key was created

static_validation.command: mise exec -- pnpm exec vite build --outDir /tmp/chess-pgnviewer-vue-dev-slice-007-build --emptyOutDir

browser_validation.inputs: temporary external empty, invalid, unsupported, two valid multi-game, duplicate-name, repeated-name, and 877 KB read-cancellation PGN inputs; temporary browser-sandbox copies were deleted after validation
browser_validation.no_source_open: Open enabled, Insert disabled, and two valid files opened three games in original file/game order as a fresh clean local source
browser_validation.same_file_reselection: the previously selected valid-a.pgn was selected again; the input value was empty afterward, a new source ID was allocated, and focus returned to Open
browser_validation.duplicate_filenames: two same.pgn files from different paths retained separate ordered result rows and inserted Duplicate A then Duplicate B with distinct game IDs
browser_validation.mixed_success: one valid plus invalid/empty/unsupported retained the exact Store snapshot before confirmation; confirmation inserted only the valid game and retained all four result rows
browser_validation.all_success: two valid multi-game files reported two files/three games and applied once
browser_validation.all_failure: empty/invalid/unsupported reported their approved reasons, retained exact source identity/revision/games/selection, and offered 重新选择/取消
browser_validation.read_cancellation: the large-file path exercised FileReader.abort and rendered 读取已取消 while preserving the exact pre-import Store snapshot
browser_validation.between_file_cancellation: a 50-unit ordered selection was cancelled after four successful parses; four successes and 46 cancelled rows remained visible, staging was discarded, and source identity/revision/games remained byte-for-byte equivalent at the captured field boundary
browser_validation.dirty_replacement: both cancellation and acceptance were exercised; cancellation preserved the dirty collection, while acceptance established a fresh clean two-game source
browser_validation.route_leave_and_stale_confirmation: a router leave attempt during the nested dirty replacement confirmation cancelled the import and was safely blocked; accepting the old confirmation afterward did not mutate the Store and all overlays cleaned up
browser_validation.application_failure: an ephemeral browser-only throwing insert boundary produced 应用棋谱失败，原工作区保持不变, no unhandled error, and an identical before/after Store snapshot
browser_validation.duplicate_actions: repeated Open/Insert activation during partial confirmation retained one dialog, one file input, one result set, and refocused the existing outcome
browser_validation.readonly: completed replay source projected Open enabled/Insert disabled, rejected mutation, then allowed a separate fresh local open
browser_validation.contract_blocked: /match/browser-validation remained request-free and mutation-free with truthful unavailable copy
browser_validation.responsive_and_themes: 1440x900 light desktop and 390x844 dark narrow layouts rendered nonblank without horizontal document overflow; the dialog stayed inside the viewport and the result list retained keyboard scrolling
browser_validation.focus_and_keyboard: pointer and keyboard actions, Tab/Shift+Tab trap, Escape cancellation/close, result heading focus, scroll-region focusability, and exact Open/Insert trigger restoration passed
browser_validation.progress_and_live_regions: real progress values 2/2, 4/4, and an observed 4/50 in-flight state matched aria bounds/current value; phase/current-file copy was present in polite live regions
browser_validation.runtime_health: nonblank DOM, no Vite error overlay, no page/application error, and no new breaking console error; the only resource message was the existing non-breaking favicon.ico 404
browser_validation.transport_and_persistence: no non-static network request, no sessionStorage entry, and no import-specific localStorage key occurred
browser_validation.artifacts: all temporary browser snapshots, console files, PGN copies, and the temporary browser directory were deleted; no browser artifact remains in the repository

cor_impact.MISSING-UI-001: implemented with ordered independent per-file canonical parsing and stable results
cor_impact.MISSING-UI-002: implemented with real progress, native read cancellation, truthful synchronous-parse limitation, route cleanup, and focus-safe progress UI
cor_impact.MISSING-UI-003: implemented with explicit partial confirmation, retained ordered results, all-success feedback, and all-failed retry/cancel
cor_impact.COR-017: the approved local PGN multi-file progress/cancellation/partial-failure slice is implemented; authority-wide COR closure is not claimed

od_boundaries.OD-01_to_OD-11: remain open and unchanged; no provisional product value was promoted to authority

limitations: Canonical PGN parsing is synchronous and cannot be interrupted mid-call; cancellation is truthful and takes effect after that call, before the next file or application.
FileReader progress event frequency is browser-controlled; the UI never fabricates intermediate values when the browser reports only completion.
The existing development server still requests a missing favicon.ico; this baseline resource 404 is non-breaking and unrelated to the slice.
deferred_work: persistence, autosave, reload recovery, and lesson/session/collection ownership
cloud, share, protected replay, live credential/subscription, hardware, and clock contracts
AI, engine evaluation, candidate insertion, venue display, and PGN presentation refactors
safe-area, scanner, and authority synchronization work

review.result: issues found, fixed, and independently re-reviewed clear
addressed: caught rejected application promises and converted them to a recoverable failed state
propagated an active-run guard into the dirty destructive confirmation execute boundary
made the result list the bounded keyboard-accessible internal scroll region
removed the duplicate progress close control and used the single 停止导入 action
removed every untracked browser artifact before final validation

commit_subject: feat(pgn): 完成多文件导入进度取消与部分失败闭环
